name: Frontend Components Integration Overview
body:
[{"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Some of the Frontend Components are available only for the React environment."}]}], "appearance": "neutral"}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Frontend Components Integration Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Overall steps for the Frontend Components integration:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "generate feed (or use platform integrations that already exist)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "create Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) account"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "choose which capabilities you want to use: Search, Autocomplete, Collections, Recommendations"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "integrate Analytics
-- all events from "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/reference/feedback-api", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Feedback API"}]}, {"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "validate with our team that we get all events properly"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "go live"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "
Generate Feed"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can refer to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/59-custom-merchantjs-integration-steps", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Custom"}]}, {"text": " integration for feed generation or utilize one of the existing integrations that we have: "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/64-remove-app-from-shopify", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Shopify"}]}, {"text": " , "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/518-integrating-search-results-in-neto", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Neto"}]}, {"text": " , "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1994-generating-bigcommerce-credentials", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "BigCommerce"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "
Integrate Analytics"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Analytics are an integral part of Merchandising Cloud that allow our ML and Personalization algorithms to operate. It is paramount that you integrate all the analytics events properly."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Some of the events rely on the request-id property that you will receive after performing a request to our backend. This helps us bind the response that we have sent with the actions that user has performed (e.g. clicked on a product in the search results)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Some of the events play a lesser role in the personalization (e.g. click-redirect event that happens when you click on a search suggestion that leads to a redirect), but it's still good to have them as in the future we might rely on such events for new features."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "
Frontend Components Overview"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can check out the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1987-architecture-overview", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Architecture Overview"}]}, {"text": " of our existing Frontend Components. You can use either some or all of them in your development, all source code is available on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/findify-js", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Github"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
